markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Omar Alderete records at least 1 assist during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Paraguay vs Australia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Paraguay vs Australia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Omar Alderete: 1+ assists?
